title: Lorry Crane Driver (Class 4/5) | Kaki Bukit | Up to $3,000 + OT
description:
• Basic salary up to $3,000 + Variable Bonus + OT.

  • Mon–Fri (8:00 AM – 5:00 PM) & Sat (8:00 AM – 12:00 PM).

  • Kaki Bukit Ave 1.

  • Operate Lorry Crane for heavy-duty transportation and delivery.

Job Summary

We are seeking a reliable and punctual Lorry Crane Driver to join our logistics team. You will be responsible for the safe loading, transportation, and unloading of goods across Singapore. This role requires a professional with a clean driving record and valid certifications to ensure our operations remain safe and efficient.

Responsibilities

  • Safe Transport: Ensure all goods are loaded, secured, and transported in a safe and professional manner.

  • Loading/Unloading: Execute the delivery of goods to designated locations according to the schedule.

  • Maintenance: Perform daily routine vehicle checks and maintain the general cleanliness of the lorry crane.

  • Accountability: Take full responsibility for all delivery goods and maintain punctuality for all trips.

  • Ad-hoc Duties: Assist with other duties as assigned by the supervisor.

Requirements

  • Must possess a Valid Crane Operator Certification.

  • Must hold a valid Class 4 or 5 Driving License.

  • At least 1 year of experience as a Class 4/5 delivery driver in Singapore.

  • Record:

    • Clean Driving Record: No history of drunk driving, over-recording, or multiple traffic violations.

    • Personal Record: Must not be blacklisted by government sectors or the police.

  • Skills: Familiarity with Singapore’s roads is essential.

  • Flexibility: Must be available to work Overtime (OT) when required.
